speaker: speaker1
text: Hi , Alice , what are you doing this sunday ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Nothing really , why , what ' s up ?

speaker: speaker1
text: If you are free , maybe you would like to go to a small party and having for my birthday party . It will be fun , you will get to know lots of people .

speaker: speaker2
text: Sounds great , I'd very much like to accept your invitation , thanks , when ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Do you need help setting up or anything ? I don't mind . I like to do that kind of thing . It's fun and I have a good eye for decorating .

speaker: speaker1
text: No . thank you . I can handle it , but thanks for the offer .

speaker: speaker2
text: Ok , I will see you then .

speaker: speaker1
text: Great , have a good day , thanks again for the offer .
